internal_anchors.details: test.js passed (3692 tests). All 72 WIN detail panels (id=winNNN) present. All summary table rows present including 057b and 058b sub-entries. Nav chain intact: 12 tabs, all showTab() calls resolved.

tab_structure.details: 12 tabs: overview, evaluate, model, selftest, wins, pages, killshots, timestamp, predictions, falsify, ai, refs. All unique IDs. Chain: overview→evaluate→model→selftest→wins→pages→killshots→timestamp→predictions→falsify→ai→refs. No orphaned tabs. All tabs have h1/h2 headings.

external_links.details: Checked 10 key institutional data source links: INTERMAGNET, NCEI/WMM, NCEI/IGRF, CHAOS-7 (DTU), NGDC poles, ESA Swarm, GRACE-FO, funwithscience.net canonical, GitHub repo all returned 200. noaa.gov returns 403 to curl without user-agent (bot protection) but 200 with browser user-agent — not a broken link, a bot-block. All DOI/publisher links skipped per protocol.

data_prose_consistency.details: 72 WINs in wins.json. 72 summary table rows in HTML (including 057b/058b). Verdict class counts in table match wins.json exactly: refuted=12, selfcon=20, misleading=16, std=18, notdemo=3, unfalsifiable=3. llms.txt accurately states 72 WIN entries covering 70 dome WIN numbers. All meta tags present (description, og:title, og:description, ClaimReview ld+json). sitemap.xml valid with 2 URLs. robots.txt present with Allow and Sitemap directives. 0 hardcoded light-theme colors in sections.json. uncounted-failures.json: 0 entries, valid schema.

win_detail_consistency.details: All 72 WINs have tldr_evidence and tldr_verdict fields. All detail panels present. Verdict color classes match verdict text throughout.

build_reproducibility.details: CRITICAL: data/predictions.json was updated in commit 9f6fe08 (2026-05-24T05:37Z, decider PRED-073 refinement integration) but docs/index.html was NOT rebuilt. The committed HTML contains the old PRED-073 detail (vague pending text), not the new quantitative analysis (IGRF-13/CHAOS-7 rate comparison showing 12-13x faster than standard physics). The diff affects PRED-073 TLDR and full detail_reasoning in the predictions tab. Fresh build produces different HTML than what is committed. Decider must run `node build.js html` and commit the output.

issues_found.description: Build drift: data/predictions.json updated (commit 9f6fe08, 2026-05-24T05:37Z) without rebuilding docs/index.html. PRED-073 predictions tab shows stale content — old vague pending text instead of new quantitative IGRF-13/CHAOS-7 analysis. Diff is 26 lines affecting PRED-073 TLDR and detail block.
issues_found.suggested_fix: cd /tmp/dome-integrity-clone && node build.js html && git add docs/index.html && git commit -m 'Rebuild: PRED-073 detail now in HTML' && git push

summary: One critical finding: build drift. Decider commit 9f6fe08 (05:37 UTC today) updated data/predictions.json with quantitative IGRF-13/CHAOS-7 analysis for PRED-073 but did not run build.js — the committed docs/index.html still shows stale PRED-073 content (vague pending text). Decider must rebuild and push. All other structural checks pass cleanly: test suite 3692/0 pass/fail, all 72 WIN detail panels present, tab structure and nav chain intact across all 12 tabs, verdict counts match wins.json exactly, meta tags and discoverability infrastructure complete, no broken external data source links (noaa.gov 403 is bot-protection not a broken link), no hardcoded light-theme colors, no broken curmudgeon review files, 0 unprocessed reviews, live/archive disjoint. Two tracked moderates: EXP-425 stale pending (ISS-2175) and expansion tracker ID gaps (ISS-2105) — no published-content impact. Drift audit refreshed (was 124h stale): 11 curmudgeon candidates queued.
